Title: Enacting the lead-free game donation act
Summary: Prohibits game taken by a firearm using lead ammunition from being donated for human consumption.
LawCode: Amd §11-0917, En Con L; amd §71-z, Ag & Mkts L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the environmental conservation law and the agriculture and markets law, in relation to enacting the "lead-free game donation act"
